title: DOM based XSS Prevention Cheat Sheet¶
attack_vector:
DOM based XSS Prevention Cheat Sheet
¶
Introduction
¶
When looking at XSS (Cross-Site Scripting), there are three generally recognized forms of
XSS
:
Reflected or Stored
DOM Based XSS
.
The
XSS Prevention Cheatsheet
does an excellent job of addressing Reflected and Stored XSS. This cheatsheet addresses DOM (Document Object Model) based XSS and is an extension (and assumes comprehension) of the
XSS Prevention Cheatsheet
.
